results.title: 'Champat Rai Was Betrayed': Mahant Kamal Das Makes Explosive Claim In Ram Temple Donation Theft Case
results.description: The controversy prompted the Shri Ram Janmabhoomi Teerth Kshetra Trust to accept the resignations of Champat Rai as general secretary and trustee Anil Mishra.

results.title: Rethinking History ~ I
results.description: Political history is too important to be left either to political memory or to political mythology. Its first obligation is historical explanation.

results.title: Congress MLAs from Northern Karnataka step up pressure to enter cabinet
results.description: The growing demand has also brought the Congress’ internal power equations into sharp focus.

results.title: Activists flag flaws in surveys at three Haryana heritage sites
results.description: Claim survey reports contain discrepancies and incomplete documentation, raising questions over their scientific reliability

results.title: US launches fresh strikes after Iran shuts Strait of Hormuz, warns against ship transit
results.description: The US launched a fresh round of strikes on Iran after Tehran closed the Strait of Hormuz again, deepening the conflict as both sides exchanged fresh threats and the fragile ceasefire came under renewed strain.
